creator: varju@webct.com
text:
Mozilla cannot compile when the heimdal-0.4d package is installed.
The heimdal package provides the header /usr/local/include/base64.h,
which causes the Mozilla build to fail on the file
mozilla/security/manager/ssl/src/nsKeygenHandler.cpp.  This file is
trying to use the function ATOB_AsciiToData, which is prototyped in
mozilla/security/nss/lib/util/base64.h, but it seems to be pulling the
base64.h from /usr/local/include in, instead.

How-To-Repeat: Install heimdal port, then try to build mozilla.
